component.name: theorem-supervisor
component.description: Process supervisor for Ring 3 enclave mode — governed agent lifecycle

component.name: theorem-bus
component.description: Governance message bus for Ring 3 agent runtime

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: aho-corasick
component.description: Fast multiple substring searching.

component.name: anstream
component.description: IO stream adapters for writing colored text that will gracefully degrade according to your terminal's capabilities.

component.name: anstyle-parse
component.description: Parse ANSI Style Escapes

component.name: anstyle-query
component.description: Look up colored console capabilities

component.name: anstyle
component.description: ANSI text styling

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: async-trait
component.description: Type erasure for async trait methods

component.author: Stjepan Glavina <stjepang@gmail.com>, Contributors to futures-rs
component.name: atomic-waker
component.description: A synchronization primitive for task wakeup

component.author: Josh Stone <cuviper@gmail.com>
component.name: autocfg
component.description: Automatic cfg for Rust compiler features

component.author: AWS-LibCrypto
component.name: aws-lc-rs
component.description: aws-lc-rs is a cryptographic library using AWS-LC for its cryptographic operations. This library strives to be API-compatible with the popular Rust library named ring.

component.author: AWS-LC
component.name: aws-lc-sys
component.description: AWS-LC is a general-purpose cryptographic library maintained by the AWS Cryptography team for AWS and their customers. It іs based on code from the Google BoringSSL project and the OpenSSL project.

licenses.expression: ISC AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC) AND Apache-2.0 AND MIT AND BSD-3-Clause AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC OR MIT) AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC OR MIT-0)

component.name: axum-core
component.description: Core types and traits for axum

component.name: axum
component.description: Web framework that focuses on ergonomics and modularity

component.author: Marshall Pierce <marshall@mpierce.org>
component.name: base64
component.description: encodes and decodes base64 as bytes or utf8

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: bitflags
component.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: block-buffer
component.description: Buffer type for block processing of data

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: byteorder
component.description: Library for reading/writing numbers in big-endian and little-endian.

component.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: bytes
component.description: Types and traits for working with bytes

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: cc
component.description: A build-time dependency for Cargo build scripts to assist in invoking the native C compiler to compile native C code into a static archive to be linked into Rust code.

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: cfg-if
component.description: A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg] parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the item that gets emitted.

component.author: Zicklag <zicklag@katharostech.com>
component.name: cfg_aliases
component.description: A tiny utility to help save you a lot of effort with long winded `#[cfg()]` checks.

component.name: chrono
component.description: Date and time library for Rust

component.name: clap
component.description: A simple to use, efficient, and full-featured Command Line Argument Parser

component.name: clap_builder
component.description: A simple to use, efficient, and full-featured Command Line Argument Parser

component.name: clap_derive
component.description: Parse command line argument by defining a struct, derive crate.

component.name: clap_lex
component.description: Minimal, flexible command line parser

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: cmake
component.description: A build dependency for running `cmake` to build a native library

component.name: colorchoice
component.description: Global override of color control

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: cpufeatures
component.description: Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets, with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: crypto-common
component.description: Common cryptographic traits

component.author: Julien Cretin <git@ia0.eu>
component.name: data-encoding
component.description: Efficient and customizable data-encoding functions like base64, base32, and hex

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: digest
component.description: Traits for cryptographic hash functions and message authentication codes

component.author: Jane Lusby <jlusby@yaah.dev>
component.name: displaydoc
component.description: A derive macro for implementing the display Trait via a doc comment and string interpolation

component.author: Kornel <kornel@geekhood.net>
component.name: dunce
component.description: Normalize Windows paths to the most compatible format, avoiding UNC where possible

component.name: equivalent
component.description: Traits for key comparison in maps.

component.author: Chris Wong <lambda.fairy@gmail.com>, Dan Gohman <dev@sunfishcode.online>
component.name: errno
component.description: Cross-platform interface to the `errno` variable.

component.name: find-msvc-tools
component.description: Find windows-specific tools, read MSVC versions from the registry and from COM interfaces

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: fnv
component.description: Fowler–Noll–Vo hash function

component.author: The rust-url developers
component.name: form_urlencoded
component.description: Parser and serializer for the application/x-www-form-urlencoded syntax, as used by HTML forms.

component.author: Denis Kurilenko <webdesus@gmail.com>
component.name: fs_extra
component.description: Expanding std::fs and std::io. Recursively copy folders with information about process and much more.

component.name: futures-channel
component.description: Channels for asynchronous communication using futures-rs.

component.name: futures-core
component.description: The core traits and types in for the `futures` library.

component.name: futures-executor
component.description: Executors for asynchronous tasks based on the futures-rs library.

component.name: futures-io
component.description: The `AsyncRead`, `AsyncWrite`, `AsyncSeek`, and `AsyncBufRead` traits for the futures-rs library.

component.name: futures-macro
component.description: The futures-rs procedural macro implementations.

component.name: futures-sink
component.description: The asynchronous `Sink` trait for the futures-rs library.

component.name: futures-task
component.description: Tools for working with tasks.

component.name: futures-util
component.description: Common utilities and extension traits for the futures-rs library.

component.name: futures
component.description: An implementation of futures and streams featuring zero allocations, composability, and iterator-like interfaces.

component.author: Bartłomiej Kamiński <fizyk20@gmail.com>, Aaron Trent <novacrazy@gmail.com>
component.name: generic-array
component.description: Generic types implementing functionality of arrays

component.author: The Rand Project Developers
component.name: getrandom
component.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

component.author: The Rand Project Developers
component.name: getrandom
component.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

component.author: The Rand Project Developers
component.name: getrandom
component.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

component.name: h2
component.description: An HTTP/2 client and server

component.name: hashbrown
component.description: A Rust port of Google's SwissTable hash map

component.name: heck
component.description: heck is a case conversion library.

component.author: KokaKiwi <kokakiwi@kokakiwi.net>
component.name: hex
component.description: Encoding and decoding data into/from hexadecimal representation.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: hmac
component.description: Generic implementation of Hash-based Message Authentication Code (HMAC)

component.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Lucio Franco <luciofranco14@gmail.com>, Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: http-body-util
component.description: Combinators and adapters for HTTP request or response bodies.

component.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Lucio Franco <luciofranco14@gmail.com>, Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: http-body
component.description: Trait representing an asynchronous, streaming, HTTP request or response body.

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>, Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: http
component.description: A set of types for representing HTTP requests and responses.

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: httparse
component.description: A tiny, safe, speedy, zero-copy HTTP/1.x parser.

component.author: Pyfisch <pyfisch@posteo.org>
component.name: httpdate
component.description: HTTP date parsing and formatting

component.name: hyper-rustls
component.description: Rustls+hyper integration for pure rust HTTPS

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: hyper-util
component.description: hyper utilities

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: hyper
component.description: A protective and efficient HTTP library for all.

component.author: Andrew Straw <strawman@astraw.com>, René Kijewski <rene.kijewski@fu-berlin.de>, Ryan Lopopolo <rjl@hyperbo.la>
component.name: iana-time-zone
component.description: get the IANA time zone for the current system

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_collections
component.description: Collection of API for use in ICU libraries.

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_locale_core
component.description: API for managing Unicode Language and Locale Identifiers

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_normalizer
component.description: API for normalizing text into Unicode Normalization Forms

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_normalizer_data
component.description: Data for the icu_normalizer crate

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_properties
component.description: Definitions for Unicode properties

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_properties_data
component.description: Data for the icu_properties crate

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: icu_provider
component.description: Trait and struct definitions for the ICU data provider

component.author: The rust-url developers
component.name: idna
component.description: IDNA (Internationalizing Domain Names in Applications) and Punycode.

component.author: The rust-url developers
component.name: idna_adapter
component.description: Back end adapter for idna

component.name: indexmap
component.description: A hash table with consistent order and fast iteration.

component.author: Kris Price <kris@krisprice.nz>
component.name: ipnet
component.description: Provides types and useful methods for working with IPv4 and IPv6 network addresses, commonly called IP prefixes. The new `IpNet`, `Ipv4Net`, and `Ipv6Net` types build on the existing `IpAddr`, `Ipv4Addr`, and `Ipv6Addr` types already provided in Rust's standard library and align to their design to stay consistent. The module also provides useful traits that extend `Ipv4Addr` and `Ipv6Addr` with methods for `Add`, `Sub`, `BitAnd`, and `BitOr` operations. The module only uses stable feature so it is guaranteed to compile using the stable toolchain.

component.author: YOSHIOKA Takuma <nop_thread@nops.red>
component.name: iri-string
component.description: IRI as string types

component.name: is_terminal_polyfill
component.description: Polyfill for `is_terminal` stdlib feature for use with older MSRVs

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: itoa
component.description: Fast integer primitive to string conversion

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: jobserver
component.description: An implementation of the GNU Make jobserver for Rust.

component.author: Marvin Löbel <loebel.marvin@gmail.com>
component.name: lazy_static
component.description: A macro for declaring lazily evaluated statics in Rust.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: libc
component.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: litemap
component.description: A key-value Map implementation based on a flat, sorted Vec.

component.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
component.name: lock_api
component.description: Wrappers to create fully-featured Mutex and RwLock types. Compatible with no_std.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: log
component.description: A lightweight logging facade for Rust

component.author: Benjamin Saunders <ben.e.saunders@gmail.com>
component.name: lru-slab
component.description: Pre-allocated storage with constant-time LRU tracking

component.author: Eliza Weisman <eliza@buoyant.io>
component.name: matchers
component.description: Regex matching on character and byte streams.

component.author: Ibraheem Ahmed <ibraheem@ibraheem.ca>
component.name: matchit
component.description: A high performance, zero-copy URL router.

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>, bluss
component.name: memchr
component.description: Provides extremely fast (uses SIMD on x86_64, aarch64 and wasm32) routines for 1, 2 or 3 byte search and single substring search.

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: mime
component.description: Strongly Typed Mimes

component.name: mio
component.description: Lightweight non-blocking I/O.

component.name: nu-ansi-term
component.description: Library for ANSI terminal colors and styles (bold, underline)

component.name: num-traits
component.description: Numeric traits for generic mathematics

component.author: Aleksey Kladov <aleksey.kladov@gmail.com>
component.name: once_cell
component.description: Single assignment cells and lazy values.

component.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
component.name: parking_lot
component.description: More compact and efficient implementations of the standard synchronization primitives.

component.name: parking_lot_core
component.description: An advanced API for creating custom synchronization primitives.

component.author: The rust-url developers
component.name: percent-encoding
component.description: Percent encoding and decoding

component.name: pin-project-lite
component.description: A lightweight version of pin-project written with declarative macros.

component.name: pin-utils
component.description: Utilities for pinning

component.name: potential_utf
component.description: Unvalidated string and character types

component.name: ppv-lite86
component.description: Cross-platform cryptography-oriented low-level SIMD library.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>, Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: proc-macro2
component.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

component.name: quinn-proto
component.description: State machine for the QUIC transport protocol

component.name: quinn-udp
component.description: UDP sockets with ECN information for the QUIC transport protocol

component.name: quinn
component.description: Versatile QUIC transport protocol implementation

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: quote
component.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

component.author: The Rand Project Developers, The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rand
component.description: Random number generators and other randomness functionality.

component.author: The Rand Project Developers, The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rand
component.description: Random number generators and other randomness functionality.

component.description: ChaCha random number generator

component.name: rand_core
component.description: Core random number generator traits and tools for implementation.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers, Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: regex-automata
component.description: Automata construction and matching using regular expressions.

component.name: regex-syntax
component.description: A regular expression parser.

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: reqwest
component.description: higher level HTTP client library

component.name: ring
component.description: An experiment.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rustc-hash
component.description: A speedy, non-cryptographic hashing algorithm used by rustc

component.name: rustls-pki-types
component.description: Shared types for the rustls PKI ecosystem

component.name: rustls-webpki
component.description: Web PKI X.509 Certificate Verification.

component.name: rustls
component.description: Rustls is a modern TLS library written in Rust.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: rustversion
component.description: Conditional compilation according to rustc compiler version

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: ryu
component.description: Fast floating point to string conversion

component.author: bluss
component.name: scopeguard
component.description: A RAII scope guard that will run a given closure when it goes out of scope, even if the code between panics (assuming unwinding panic). Defines the macros `defer!`, `defer_on_unwind!`, `defer_on_success!` as shorthands for guards with one of the implemented strategies.

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde
component.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_core
component.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_derive
component.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_json
component.description: A JSON serialization file format

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_path_to_error
component.description: Path to the element that failed to deserialize

component.name: serde_spanned
component.description: Serde-compatible spanned Value

component.author: Anthony Ramine <n.oxyde@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_urlencoded
component.description: `x-www-form-urlencoded` meets Serde

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: sha1
component.description: SHA-1 hash function

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: sha2
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of the SHA-2 hash function family including SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

component.author: Eliza Weisman <eliza@buoyant.io>
component.name: sharded-slab
component.description: A lock-free concurrent slab.

component.author: comex <comexk@gmail.com>, Fenhl <fenhl@fenhl.net>, Adrian Taylor <adetaylor@chromium.org>, Alex Touchet <alextouchet@outlook.com>, Daniel Parks <dp+git@oxidized.org>, Garrett Berg <googberg@gmail.com>
component.name: shlex
component.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.

component.author: Michal 'vorner' Vaner <vorner@vorner.cz>, Masaki Hara <ackie.h.gmai@gmail.com>
component.name: signal-hook-registry
component.description: Backend crate for signal-hook

component.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>
component.name: slab
component.description: Pre-allocated storage for a uniform data type

component.author: The Servo Project Developers
component.name: smallvec
component.description: 'Small vector' optimization: store up to a small number of items on the stack

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>, Thomas de Zeeuw <thomasdezeeuw@gmail.com>
component.name: socket2
component.description: Utilities for handling networking sockets with a maximal amount of configuration possible intended.

component.author: Robert Grosse <n210241048576@gmail.com>
component.name: stable_deref_trait
component.description: An unsafe marker trait for types like Box and Rc that dereference to a stable address even when moved, and hence can be used with libraries such as owning_ref and rental.

component.author: Danny Guo <danny@dannyguo.com>, maxbachmann <oss@maxbachmann.de>
component.name: strsim
component.description: Implementations of string similarity metrics. Includes Hamming, Levenshtein, OSA, Damerau-Levenshtein, Jaro, Jaro-Winkler, and Sørensen-Dice.

component.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
component.name: subtle
component.description: Pure-Rust traits and utilities for constant-time cryptographic implementations.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: syn
component.description: Parser for Rust source code

component.author: Actyx AG <developer@actyx.io>
component.name: sync_wrapper
component.description: A tool for enlisting the compiler's help in proving the absence of concurrency

component.author: Nika Layzell <nika@thelayzells.com>
component.name: synstructure
component.description: Helper methods and macros for custom derives

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: thiserror-impl
component.description: Implementation detail of the `thiserror` crate

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: thiserror-impl
component.description: Implementation detail of the `thiserror` crate

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: thiserror
component.description: derive(Error)

component.name: thiserror
component.description: derive(Error)

component.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
component.name: thread_local
component.description: Per-object thread-local storage

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: tinystr
component.description: A small ASCII-only bounded length string representation.

component.author: Lokathor <zefria@gmail.com>
component.name: tinyvec
component.description: `tinyvec` provides 100% safe vec-like data structures.

component.author: Soveu <marx.tomasz@gmail.com>
component.name: tinyvec_macros
component.description: Some macros for tiny containers

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tokio-macros
component.description: Tokio's proc macros.

component.name: tokio-rustls
component.description: Asynchronous TLS/SSL streams for Tokio using Rustls.

component.author: Daniel Abramov <dabramov@snapview.de>, Alexey Galakhov <agalakhov@snapview.de>
component.name: tokio-tungstenite
component.description: Tokio binding for Tungstenite, the Lightweight stream-based WebSocket implementation

component.author: Daniel Abramov <dabramov@snapview.de>, Alexey Galakhov <agalakhov@snapview.de>
component.name: tokio-tungstenite
component.description: Tokio binding for Tungstenite, the Lightweight stream-based WebSocket implementation

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tokio-util
component.description: Additional utilities for working with Tokio.

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tokio
component.description: An event-driven, non-blocking I/O platform for writing asynchronous I/O backed applications.

component.name: toml
component.description: A native Rust encoder and decoder of TOML-formatted files and streams. Provides implementations of the standard Serialize/Deserialize traits for TOML data to facilitate deserializing and serializing Rust structures.

component.name: toml_datetime
component.description: A TOML-compatible datetime type

component.name: toml_edit
component.description: Yet another format-preserving TOML parser.

component.name: toml_write
component.description: A low-level interface for writing out TOML

component.author: Tower Maintainers <team@tower-rs.com>
component.name: tower-http
component.description: Tower middleware and utilities for HTTP clients and servers

component.author: Tower Maintainers <team@tower-rs.com>
component.name: tower-layer
component.description: Decorates a `Service` to allow easy composition between `Service`s.

component.author: Tower Maintainers <team@tower-rs.com>
component.name: tower-service
component.description: Trait representing an asynchronous, request / response based, client or server.

component.author: Tower Maintainers <team@tower-rs.com>
component.name: tower
component.description: Tower is a library of modular and reusable components for building robust clients and servers.

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>, Eliza Weisman <eliza@buoyant.io>, David Barsky <dbarsky@amazon.com>
component.name: tracing-attributes
component.description: Procedural macro attributes for automatically instrumenting functions.

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tracing-core
component.description: Core primitives for application-level tracing.

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tracing-log
component.description: Provides compatibility between `tracing` and the `log` crate.

component.author: Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tracing-serde
component.description: A compatibility layer for serializing trace data with `serde`

component.author: Eliza Weisman <eliza@buoyant.io>, David Barsky <me@davidbarsky.com>, Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tracing-subscriber
component.description: Utilities for implementing and composing `tracing` subscribers.

component.author: Eliza Weisman <eliza@buoyant.io>, Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
component.name: tracing
component.description: Application-level tracing for Rust.

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: try-lock
component.description: A lightweight atomic lock.

component.author: Alexey Galakhov, Daniel Abramov
component.name: tungstenite
component.description: Lightweight stream-based WebSocket implementation

component.author: Alexey Galakhov, Daniel Abramov
component.name: tungstenite
component.description: Lightweight stream-based WebSocket implementation

component.author: Paho Lurie-Gregg <paho@paholg.com>, Andre Bogus <bogusandre@gmail.com>
component.name: typenum
component.description: Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its implementation is incomplete.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: unicode-ident
component.description: Determine whether characters have the XID_Start or XID_Continue properties according to Unicode Standard Annex #31

component.author: Brian Smith <brian@briansmith.org>
component.name: untrusted
component.description: Safe, fast, zero-panic, zero-crashing, zero-allocation parsing of untrusted inputs in Rust.

component.author: The rust-url developers
component.name: url
component.description: URL library for Rust, based on the WHATWG URL Standard

component.author: Simon Sapin <simon.sapin@exyr.org>
component.name: utf-8
component.description: Incremental, zero-copy UTF-8 decoding with error handling

component.author: Henri Sivonen <hsivonen@hsivonen.fi>
component.name: utf8_iter
component.description: Iterator by char over potentially-invalid UTF-8 in &[u8]

component.author: Joe Wilm <joe@jwilm.com>, Christian Duerr <contact@christianduerr.com>
component.name: utf8parse
component.description: Table-driven UTF-8 parser

component.author: Ashley Mannix<ashleymannix@live.com.au>, Dylan DPC<dylan.dpc@gmail.com>, Hunar Roop Kahlon<hunar.roop@gmail.com>
component.name: uuid
component.description: A library to generate and parse UUIDs.

component.author: Sergio Benitez <sb@sergio.bz>
component.name: version_check
component.description: Tiny crate to check the version of the installed/running rustc.

component.author: Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
component.name: want
component.description: Detect when another Future wants a result.

component.name: webpki-roots
component.description: Mozilla's CA root certificates for use with webpki

component.name: winnow
component.description: A byte-oriented, zero-copy, parser combinators library

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: writeable
component.description: A more efficient alternative to fmt::Display

component.author: Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: yoke-derive
component.description: Custom derive for the yoke crate

component.author: Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: yoke
component.description: Abstraction allowing borrowed data to be carried along with the backing data it borrows from

component.author: Joshua Liebow-Feeser <joshlf@google.com>, Jack Wrenn <jswrenn@amazon.com>
component.name: zerocopy
component.description: Zerocopy makes zero-cost memory manipulation effortless. We write "unsafe" so you don't have to.

component.author: Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: zerofrom-derive
component.description: Custom derive for the zerofrom crate

component.author: Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: zerofrom
component.description: ZeroFrom trait for constructing

component.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
component.name: zeroize
component.description: Securely clear secrets from memory with a simple trait built on stable Rust primitives which guarantee memory is zeroed using an operation will not be 'optimized away' by the compiler. Uses a portable pure Rust implementation that works everywhere, even WASM!

component.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
component.name: zeroize_derive
component.description: Custom derive support for zeroize

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: zerotrie
component.description: A data structure that efficiently maps strings to integers

component.author: Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: zerovec-derive
component.description: Custom derive for the zerovec crate

component.author: The ICU4X Project Developers
component.name: zerovec
component.description: Zero-copy vector backed by a byte array

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: zmij
component.description: A double-to-string conversion algorithm based on Schubfach and yy
